data.body: R7 (#761) FULLY GREEN: LLM-Review +1 AND Verified +1 (recheck passed on the same base R6 keeps flaking on — proving the flakes are intermittent/beatable). R7 is submittable but STACKED on R6 (#760), which has now failed Verified 3-4x on the flaky enrich-queue concurrency tests; posted recheck #4. Once R6 goes green, Submit the stack (submitting #761 pulls #760). E2 round-4: 2 blocks on class-5 (untagged operational AC) — its DETECTOR is R2's future lint (P6 is a tag FP-suppressor, not a missing-tag detector), so class-5 is R2-entangled like E5<->R5; reframed E2 as corpus+current-gate-baseline+harness+thresholds (per-candidate detection measured at each R-story's landing). E3 round-4->5 (1 block, new_advisory_median_delta defn fixed). E6 round-4->5 (permutation/pass3-shape fixes).
